hero.title: The First On-Chain Deobank Connecting Traditional Finance and Web3
hero.subtitle: Bridging Traditional Finance and Web3
hero.description: WeFi leverages the WeChain blockchain to provide secure, transparent, and regulated banking services directly on-chain. Experience the future of finance where you own your assets.

deobank.title: Global Accessibility
deobank.desc: Access banking services without intermediaries, anywhere in the world.

mpc.title: MPC Security
mpc.desc: Your keys, your control. Multi-Party Computation ensures institutional-grade security.

cards.title: WeFi Visa Cards
cards.desc: Spend your crypto anywhere with instant conversion to fiat.

narrative.title: Onchain Solvency
narrative.quote: "WeFi is not just another bank; it's a protocol for trust. By moving the internal ledger to WeChain, we eliminate human error and fraud."
narrative.role: Chairman of WeFi and Co-Creator of USDT (Tether)

AboutPage.title: Our Mission
AboutPage.vision: To create a transparent financial ecosystem where mathematics replaces reputation as the foundation of trust.

onchainAccounting.title: Onchain Accounting
onchainAccounting.desc: Unlike opaque traditional banks, WeFi operates on a transparent ledger. Real-time proof of solvency for everyone.

proofOfSolvency.title: Proof of Solvency
proofOfSolvency.desc: Real-time public auditing ensures that every dollar in the ecosystem is accounted for on WeChain. WeFi is not a traditional bank taking fractional reserves; all fiat is backed securely and verified.

pioneers.title: Led by Crypto Pioneers
pioneers.desc: WeFi is built by veterans from Tether, Wise, Bitpanda, Binance, and Visa. This isn't our first breakthrough. But it might be yours. Your crypto, your rules: earn, spend, and grow without limits.

TeamPage.title: Leadership & Visionaries
TeamPage.subtitle: A team of veterans from Tether, Wise, Binance, and Visa.

reeve.name: Reeve Collins
reeve.bio: Co-founder of Tether (USDT). A pioneer who shaped the stablecoin market.

maksym.name: Maksym Sakharov
maksym.bio: Former CEO at Exflow, expert in scaling financial infrastructure.

roman.name: Roman Rossov
roman.bio: Ex-Product Director at Wise. Bringing global payment expertise to Web3.

khalid.name: Khaled Suleiman
khalid.bio: ex-CEO at National Bank of Abu Dhabi

evgeniy.name: Moshé Ostrovsky
evgeniy.bio: Project participant and active contributor to the WeFi ecosystem infrastructure and UI development.

token.name: $WFI Token
token.desc: The native utility asset of WeChain. Used for fees, staking, and governance.

energy.title: Energy Mechanism
energy.desc: A unique loyalty unit generated by holding $WFI. Used to offset transaction fees and access CBM mining.

governance.title: Deterministic Governance
governance.desc: The emission protocol is fixed by code. Every 730 days, the rewards per block halven, ensuring long-term scarcity and commitment to the 1 Billion WFI cap.

moshe.name: Moshé Ostrovsky
moshe.bio: Project participant and active contributor to the WeFi ecosystem infrastructure and UI development.

ContactPage.title: Get in Touch
ContactPage.desc: Join the future of finance. Reach out to our global team for partnerships or support.

posts.title: Episode 3: The Dawn of Onchain Banking
Understanding MPC: Why Seed Phrases are Obsolete

PlatformPage.title: Banking Redefined
PlatformPage.desc: Modular financial services built on the world's first decentralized onchain stack.

unified.title: Unified Balance
unified.desc: Powered by DEONE - Onchain Banking. Money Beyond Borders. Blends the reliability of banking with the limitless possibilities of blockchain.

cards.title: WeFi Visa Cards
cards.desc: Spend your digital assets worldwide with automated tax-compliant conversion to local fiat.

credit.title: Decentralized Credit
credit.desc: Borrow against your assets instantly without credit checks, powered by Onchain Accounting.

mining.title: Cloud-Based Mining
mining.desc: Participate in the WFI emission protocol via efficient cloud-hosted mining modules (CBM-20).

mpc.title: MPC Security Architecture
mpc.desc: WeFi completely eliminates seed-phrase vulnerability by utilizing Multi-Party Computation. Your keys are split into shards, requiring a 2-of-2 signature between your device and the secure WeChain vault.

faqs.a: A Deobank is a decentralized onchain bank that operates through smart contracts on the WeChain blockchain, ensuring transparency and user sovereignty.
Multi-Party Computation (MPC) splits your private key into fragments (User Share and Platform Share). Transactions require 2-of-2 signatures, preventing single points of failure.
The $WFI token is the native asset of WeChain. It's used to pay network fees, participate in staking rewards, and govern the protocol's evolution.
Energy is automatically generated by holding $WFI in your wallet. It can be used to offset transaction fees and purchase CBM units.

gitbook.title: GitBook Documentation
gitbook.desc: Deep dive into technical architecture and protocol specifications.
